title: Earthy Cinnamon Chinese Beef Stir-fry
description: A nostalgic and earthy Chinese dish featuring mixed beef cuts in a flavorful Mediterranean-inspired sauce that is both crisp and simmered to perfection.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onions, garlic, and bell peppers. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes until the vegetables are slightly softened.
Cut beef into thin strips and add to the wok. Season with salt, pepper, and a pinch of red chili flakes if preferred.
Pour in vegetable broth or water, stir gently, and cook for another minute to allow flavors to meld together.
Add sliced green onions on top just before serving. Ensure the beef is cooked through but still tender.
